creator: hg@cally.queue.to
text:
print/acroread7 expects to find its fonts beneath /usr/X11R6 and exits 
when it doesn't find them there

Fix: 

manually /usr/compat/linux/etc/fonts/fonts.conf replacing

        <dir>/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/fonts</dir>
with
        <dir>/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts</dir>
How-To-Repeat: 	
Ensure there is no symlink /usr/X11R6->/usr/local, build clean
print/acroread7
